Requirement ingestion
Checking proxy…
Ready 0 requirements

⚙ One-time setup required (CORS restriction)

Browsers block direct calls to the Anthropic API from local HTML files. You need to run the included proxy.py once — it takes 10 seconds.

Step 1 — Open a terminal in this folder
Step 2 — Run:  python3 proxy.py --key sk-ant-YOUR_KEY_HERE
Step 3 — Come back here — the green indicator above will confirm it's connected
No Python? Install from python.org (free, 2 min). Your API key stays on your machine — proxy.py never sends it anywhere except Anthropic.
